docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project1.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: About Chitta Doc Hub
docs.text:
Welcome to Chitta Doc Hub — a personal site built with MkDocs Material to showcase documentation, ideas, and blog posts.

This site is designed to help you explore:

  • an introduction to the author and the project
  • a clean blog menu for different topics
  • a modern documentation layout powered by MkDocs Material

docs.title: What you'll find here
docs.text:
• Home: quick start and core documentation
  • About: project background and purpose
  • Blogs: curated articles and notes organized for easy browsing

This site is built with MkDocs Material, which gives a responsive layout, search, and a polished theme.

docs.title: Blog Overview
docs.text: Welcome to the Blog section. This page is the central place for curated posts and resources.

docs.title: What to expect
docs.text:
• clear, organized posts grouped under one blog path
  • a site structure that matches the MkDocs blog plugin
  • easy navigation via the Blog menu item

docs.title: Writing with MkDocs
docs.text: MkDocs is a static site generator focused on project documentation. When paired with the Material theme, it becomes an excellent platform for blogs, tutorials, and knowledge bases.

docs.title: Why MkDocs
docs.text:
• simple Markdown-based writing
  • fast live preview with mkdocs serve
  • easy navigation and search
  • built-in support for a clean site structure

docs.title: Getting started
docs.text:
1. Create a new Markdown page in docs/
  2. Add it to the navigation under mkdocs.yml
  3. Run mkdocs serve to preview locally
  4. Publish with mkdocs gh-deploy when ready

docs.title: Tips
docs.text:
• keep content organized in folders like blogs/
  • use headings and lists to make articles scannable
  • link between pages using relative paths

docs.title: Creating a Modern Blog
docs.text: A modern blog structure should be easy to navigate and visually consistent across posts.

docs.title: Blog layout
docs.text:
• a landing page with an overview
  • separate pages for each article
  • navigation grouped under a single Blogs menu item

docs.title: Next steps
docs.text:
• add more posts under docs/blogs/
  • update the nav section in mkdocs.yml
  • customize the theme with Material features like palettes and icons

This layout keeps the site clean and scalable as you add more content.
